info.title: API Type: wLightBox
info.description:
# Introduction It is **specific API** of BleBox devices with **API type:** *wLightBox*

**Please check** **API type** and **API level** (version) before use,
**if you don't see the expected field** in response from a real device then **hardware version do not support this feature**.

servers.description: Controller's web server - connecting via device's WiFi AP
Controller's web server - connecting via local network - please change IP
Controller's web server - connecting via local network - for own DNS resolving

product.description: Product name for informational purpose only - do not use it in any application logic

type.description: **API type** of BleBox device - it indicate what **device-specific API** should be used

apiLevel.description: **API level** of BleBox device - it indicate what version of **common and device-specific API** should be used

hv.description: Hardware version for informational purpose only - do not use it in any application logic

fv.description: Firmware version for informational purpose only - do not use it in any application logic

id.description: Unique identification number of BleBox device

get.description:
Returns **general information** about device

**It is deprecated** -> look at:
Returns information about **number of seconds from boot**

upTimeS.description: Number of **seconds** since the device was turned on

get.description: Returns information about **internal WiFi AP** or about connected **local WiFi network**

bssid.description:
BSSID of connected WiFi network.
**Empty string** indicates that **no WiFi network was found**

mac.description:
MAC address of BleBox device.
This interface connect to Access Point (to local WiFi network)

tunnel_status.description:
Status of **cloud connection** (remote access), where:
Enum: Description:
**0** Waiting for stable WiFi connection
**1** Connecting
**2** Internet network is unreachable (DNS failed)
**3** Internet network is unreachable (server not found)
**4** Connection broken (connection was estabilished but it's broken now)
**5** Connected
**6** Disabled by user

channel.description: Channel of **internal** WiFi Access Point. **If device is connected to local WiFi** network then internal WiFi **channel is the same** as local WiFi Access Point's channel

get.description:
Returns information about **connected local WiFi network** and **if scanning is in progress**

**It is deprecated** -> look at:

scanning.description:
Parameter that show if **WiFi scanning is in progress**, where:
Enum: Description:
**false** disabled
**true** enabled

ssid.description:
SSID of connected WiFi network.
**Empty string** indicates that **no WiFi network was selected**

ip.description:
IPv4 of BleBox device connected to local WiFi network.
**Empty string** indicates that **no WiFi network was connected**

station_status.description:
Status of current **WiFi connection**, where:
Enum: Description:
**0** Not configured
**1** Connecting
**2** Wrong password
**3** WiFi network not found
**4** Communication with WiFi network failed
**5** Connected

post.description: **Allows to set** interal access Point's **ssid and password**. Allows also to **turn off internal AP**.

apEnable.description:
Parameter that show if **internal** WiFi Access Point is enabled, where:
Enum: Description:
**false** disabled
**true** enabled

If **false** - **apSSID** and **apPasswd** can be ignored.

apPasswd.description:
Password of **internal** WiFi Access Point.
WPA2-PSK is used.
Empty string or 'null' indicates that internal AP is set to open mode (without password).

get.summary: Perform WiFi scan and get results
get.description: **Perform WiFi scan** and **return list of found WiFi** networks. Return conflict if scanning is in progress

rssi.description:
**Signal strength** of found network, where:
From: To: Description:
**-67** **0** Very good
**-73** **-68** Good
**-80** **-74** Poor
**-127** **-81** Unstable/Unusable

enc.description:
**Encryption mode** of found network, where:
Enum: Description:
**0** Open network (without password) - unsafe, but can be used
**1** WEP encryption - unsafe - can not be used
**2** WPA encryption - unsafe - can not be used
**3** WPA2 encryption - safe if properly configured - can be used (recomended)
**4** WPA/WPA2 encryption - unsafe, but can be used as WPA2

post.description: Perform connect to local WiFi network

ssid.description:
SSID of WiFi network.
**Empty string** will disconnect from WiFi network

pwd.description: Password to WiFi network. Empty string or 'null' indicates open mode (without password).

post.description: **Perform firmware update**. Return conflict if update is in progress

get.description: **Returns** information about **mode, selected effect, color and transition times**

post.description: Allows to **set desired color, effect and transition times**

get.description:
**Returns** information about **mode, selected effect, color, transition times**.
Additionaly returns **favorite colors** and **effects names**
*(All parameters needed to display user interface)*

post.description:
Allows to **set state of lighting** - **effect, color, transition times**
Additionaly allows to set extended parameters - **favorite colors**

get.description: **Turning ON effect with given ID** using GET request
**Set color with color fade time** in milliseconds using GET request

get.summary: Set color for a given time
get.description: **Set color for given time** using GET request (after given time returns to previous state)

get.summary: Set effect for a given time
get.description: **Turning ON effect with given ID** using GET request (after given time returns to previous state)

get.summary: Set color with fade time for a given time
get.description: **Set color with color fade time for given time** using GET request (after given time returns to previous state)

timeS.name: timeS
timeS.description: **Time in seconds** for which the selected **state will be set**, **after this time the last state will be restored**.

rgbw.description: An object which contain parameters related with **LED lighting**
An object which contain **extended parameters** related with **LED lighting**
An object containing parameters related with **LED lighting**
An object containing **extended parameters** related with **LED lighting**

tunnel.description: Allows to **enable or disable** connection with **BleBox's tunnel/cloud/servers**

statusLed.description: Allows to **enable** or **disable** extended status notification using built in **LED**

durationsMs.description: Object which contain parameters connected with **transitions of color and effects**

favColors.description:
**Dictionary of favorite colors** saved on device
*(Parameters needed to display favorite colors in user interface)*

effectNames.description:
**Dictionary of effects** saved on device
*(Parameters needed to display effects in user interface)*

colorMode.description:
**Type of controlled appliance** (type and quantity of LED strips), where:
Enum: Description:
**1** **RGBW**
**2** **RGB**
**3** **MONO** - 4 separated channel (LED strips)
**4** **RGB or W**
* RGBW but with exceptive parts: color (RGB) and white (W), where
white (W) part has priority*
**5** **CT** (color temperature)
*For one 2-channel LED strips
(warm white - 1:(R); cold white - 1:(G))*
**6** **CTx2** - 2 separated LED strips (color temperature)
*For two separated 2-channel LED strips
(warm white - 1:(R),2:(B); cold white - 1:(G),2:(W))*


*Warring: This settings is available only in 4-channels controllers. Allowed colorMode depends on hardware/firmware version (field preferences)*

outputMode.description:
**Type of output signal** (depend on controlled LED strip/module), where:
Enum: Description:
**1** **linearizedPWM**
**2** **linearizedAndInvertedPWM**
**3** **linePWM**
**4** **linearizedCcPWM**


*Warring: This settings is available only in 1-channels controllers. Allowed outputMode depends from hardware/firmware version (field preferences)*

buttonMode.description:
**Behaviour of connected button**, where:
Enum: Description:
**0** **None**
**1** **on - off (100%)**
**2** **on - off (last brightness)**
**3** **on - off (100%) with dimming**
**4** **on - off (last brightness) with dimming**


*Warring: This settings is available only in controllers with button input. Allowed buttonMode depends from hardware/firmware version (field preferences)*

effectID.description:
**No (ID) of Effect**, where
Value: Decription:
**0** **None Effect** - Disable current effect and restore previous state
**>0** **Effect** - Turn on selected effect **(if exist)**

adjust.description:
As the name of field says

**inc** or **dec** to increase or decrease brightness

colorValue.description:
As the name of field says

**Color value in format: 4 channels (R)(G)(B)(W) or 1 channel (S)**, where
every channel can get value between: **00-FF** (HEX) *(DEC: 0-255)*

colorSet.description:
**Color value in format: 4 channels (R)(G)(B)(W) or 1 channel (S)**, where
every channel can get value between: **00-FF** (HEX) *(DEC: 0-255)*

**Use "--"** instead hex value **to keep channel unchanged** - e.g. ff00--12.

colorFade.description:
**Time of transition from current color to desired color** measured in **milliseconds**
(full scale: 0x00 -> 0xff)

effectFade.description:
**Time of color transition in current effect** measured in milliseconds
(full scale: 0x00 -> 0xff, value will be overwritten at beginning of another effect to default value of selected effect)

effectStep.description:
**Duration of step (color) in current effect** measured in milliseconds
(value will be overwritten at beginning of another effect to default value of selected effect)

pwmFreq.description:
**Frequency of LED dimming**. **Useful for filmmakers**.
Allowed frequencies depends from hardware/firmware version (field preferences)
Frequencies over 1200Hz (not exist in field preferences) and can be set only via API!

fieldsPreferences.description:
**Values of settings which are allowed by controller** (hardware/firmware version)
*(Parameters needed to display settings page in user interface)*

values.description: List of allowed values ​​in this field
